claim_boundary.allowed_current_wording: Tier-A1 validates a working H0_obs calibration-drift mechanism and activation/collapse behavior in late-only data.
claim_boundary.not_allowed_as_current_Tier_A1_claim: EDCL decisively resolves the Hubble tension.
claim_boundary.scope_note: This compact summary records late-only mechanism behavior. It is not a standalone full Hubble-tension resolution or Planck-compatibility result.

h0_likelihood_convention.lcdm_local_h0: direct H0.riess2020 is allowed for LCDM
h0_likelihood_convention.edcl_with_local_h0: H0_edcl is required; direct H0.riess2020 is forbidden; derived H0_obs and delta0 are required
h0_likelihood_convention.edcl_no_h0: H0_edcl and direct H0.riess2020 are forbidden

collapse_threshold_note: The no-H0 posterior mean shifts toward zero, but q95(alpha_R)=0.0497 exceeds the pre-registered pass threshold q95<=0.03 in cosmology/config/validation_config.yaml. This supports a collapse tendency, not a threshold pass under the current validation configuration.

best_fit_accounting.note: The total best-fit improvement is modest and is a diagnostic mechanism result, not decisive model-comparison evidence.

next_required_validations: documented Bayesian-evidence provenance if evidence claims are made
